gates.name: capabilities_search_state
command: repository state status dashboard publish package

json.query: repository state status dashboard publish package

entries.name: Repository State Report
entries.summary: Composes objective audit, release evidence, package readiness, Git state, and continuation actions into compact JSON and Markdown state artifacts.

entries.name: Release Evidence and Publish Readiness
entries.summary: Generates a machine-readable publish-readiness artifact with package, governance, capability registry, and git branch/commit/remote state.

entries.name: Publish Clone Acceptance Fixture
entries.summary: Copies the current RePERS worktree into a temporary source repo, pushes it to a local bare remote, clones it, and verifies RePERS from the clone.

entries.name: Package Readiness and Round Trip
entries.summary: Builds a reusable RePERS archive with manifest, readiness sidecar, governance files, and round-trip install verification.

entries.name: Publish Handoff Artifact
entries.summary: Writes non-destructive JSON and Markdown handoff artifacts with remote, push, and draft PR commands derived from release evidence.

entries.name: Sequential Local Verification
entries.summary: Runs RePERS local gates sequentially with isolated temp outputs and writes a compact verify-all evidence artifact.

entries.name: Installed Receiver Acceptance Fixture
entries.summary: Installs the packaged RePERS archive into a fresh Git repository and proves receiver commands: verify-install, doctor, bundle-status, capabilities, and fixture.

entries.name: Remote Bootstrap Artifact
entries.summary: Writes provider-neutral remote setup evidence and can optionally apply git remote add before regenerating publish handoff artifacts.

entries.name: Generated Snapshot Freshness
entries.summary: Compares generated state, release, objective-audit, and verify-all snapshots with live Git state so committed evidence is not mistaken for current state.

entries.name: Open Source Receiver Governance
entries.summary: Contributor, maintainer, support, security, roadmap, changelog, example, and CI surfaces expected in the package.

entries.name: Objective Completion Audit
entries.summary: Audits the whole RePERS repository against the requested end-state and records proven, incomplete, and externally blocked requirements.

entries.name: Local Capability Registry
entries.summary: Canonical JSON inventory of reusable RePERS workflows, scripts, hooks, templates, and package gates.

entries.name: Source Install Acceptance Fixture
entries.summary: Proves a source or cloned RePERS repository can install itself into a fresh receiver Git repository with one CLI command and verify there.

entries.name: Task DAG Planning and Execution
entries.summary: Parses plan.md into plan.json, lists ready DAG steps, dispatches parallel worker prompts, and updates step status.

gates.stdout_tail:
-json"
      ],
      "score": 1

    {
      "id": "source-install-fixture",
      "kind": "harness",
      "name": "Source Install Acceptance Fixture",
      "summary": "Proves a source or cloned RePERS repository can install itself into a fresh receiver Git repository with one CLI command and verify there.",
      "tags": [
        "install",
        "bootstrap",
        "source",
        "clone",
        "receiver",
        "fixture",
        "verify-install"
      ],
      "commands": [
        "python .repers/scripts/repers.py install --target <target-repo> --json",
        "python .repers/scripts/repers.py source-install-fixture --json"
      ],
      "paths": [
        "scripts/source_install_fixture.py",
        "scripts/install_repers.py",
        "scripts/repers.py",
        "scripts/verify_all.py",
        "scripts/objective_audit.py",
        "docs/contracts.md",
        "dist/repers-source-install-fixture.json"
      ],
      "verification": [
        "python .repers/scripts/repers.py source-install-fixture --json"
      ],
      "score": 1
    },
    {
      "id": "task-dag",
      "kind": "workflow",
      "name": "Task DAG Planning and Execution",
      "summary": "Parses plan.md into plan.json, lists ready DAG steps, dispatches parallel worker prompts, and updates step status.",
      "tags": [
        "dag",
        "plan",
        "dispatch",
        "worker",
        "parallel",
        "execution"
      ],
      "commands": [
        "python .repers/scripts/repers.py plan --task <task> --json",
        "python .repers/scripts/repers.py run --task <task> --action dry-run --json",
        "python .repers/scripts/repers.py dispatch --task <task> --json"
      ],
      "paths": [
        "scripts/dag_engine.py",
        "scripts/plan_runner.py",
        "templates/plan.md",
        "docs/workflow.md"
      ],
      "verification": [
        "python .repers/scripts/repers.py fixture --action prove --json"
      ],
      "score": 1
    }
  ]
}
